cluster: C3: Auxin + Brassinosteroid in seed size

papers.title: Auxin production in the endosperm drives seed coat development in Arabidopsis
papers.authors: Figueiredo DD, Batista RA, Roszak PJ, Hennig L, Kohler C

papers.title: Brassinosteroid Regulates Seed Size and Shape in Arabidopsis
papers.authors: Jiang WB, Huang HY, Hu YW, Zhu SW, Wang ZY, Lin WH

papers.title: Auxin regulates endosperm cellularization in Arabidopsis
papers.authors: Batista RA, Figueiredo DD, Santos-Gonzalez J, Kohler C

papers.title: Hormonal regulation and crosstalk during early endosperm and seed coat development
papers.authors: Pankaj R, Lima RB, Figueiredo DD

papers.title: Current perspectives on the hormonal control of seed development in Arabidopsis and maize: a focus on auxin
Control of Arabidopsis seed mass by Auxin Response Factor 2 (ARF2)
papers.authors: Schruff MC, Spielman M, Tiwari S, Adams S, Fenby N, Scott RJ

papers.title: Brassinosteroid functions in Arabidopsis seed development
papers.authors: Sun Y, Veerabomma S, Abdel-Mageed HA, Fokar M, Asami T, Yoshida S, Allen RD

edges.mechanism: flavin monooxygenase converts IPA to IAA
edges.evidence: Auxin biosynthesis following fertilization of the central cell is dependent on the paternally-expressed genes YUC10 and TAR1

edges.mechanism: flavin monooxygenase biosynthesis
edges.evidence: Two YUC genes expressed in the endosperm, YUC10 and YUC11

edges.mechanism: tryptophan aminotransferase in auxin biosynthesis
edges.evidence: YUC10 and TAR1 are paternally expressed in endosperm; drive post-fertilization auxin production

edges.mechanism: MADS-box TF activates PGP10 transporter transcription
edges.evidence: PGP10 expression required AGL62 function; PGP10 expression not detectable in agl62 seeds

edges.mechanism: ABCB-type auxin efflux transporter moves auxin from endosperm to integuments
edges.evidence: Auxin quickly exported into integuments via PGP10

edges.mechanism: transcriptional downregulation + post-translational removal
edges.evidence: Sporophytic PRC2-coding genes strongly downregulated after fertilization as well as after exogenous application of 2,4-D

edges.mechanism: indirect via GA activation of DELLA degradation
edges.evidence: When PRC2 function is removed, GA signaling activated; RGA protein destabilization; GFP:RGA strongly reduced in vrn2/emf2 or swn/clf mutants

edges.mechanism: cell elongation + differentiation (proanthocyanidin)
edges.evidence: Ovules treated with 2,4-D significantly larger; 30-40% show seed coat development without fertilization

edges.mechanism: post-fertilization auxin triggers central cell division
edges.evidence: ectopic auxin biosynthesis in unfertilized central cell drives endosperm development

edges.mechanism: high auxin delays cellularization transition
edges.evidence: YUC10 and TAR1 expression significantly lower at heart stage when cellularization initiates; IaaH-driven auxin overproduction causes cellularization failure

edges.mechanism: H3K27me3 silences maternal YUC10 pre-fertilization
edges.evidence: gametophytic PRC2 silences the maternal alleles encoding YUC10 and TAR1

edges.mechanism: H3K27me3 silences maternal TAR1 pre-fertilization
edges.evidence: gametophytic PRC2 silences the maternal alleles encoding YUC10 and TAR1

edges.mechanism: F-box auxin co-receptor targets Aux/IAA for degradation
edges.evidence: axr1 (AXR1/AXL1 auxin signaling mutant) partially restores cellularization in 3x seeds

edges.mechanism: AUXIN RESPONSE FACTOR 2 represses integument cell division
edges.evidence: ARF2 negatively regulates auxin signaling and seed size via downregulation of cell division in the integument

edges.mechanism: transcriptional activation of HB33 homeodomain gene
edges.evidence: ARF2 and its regulated homeodomain gene HB33 mediate ABA response

edges.mechanism: co-repressor binds EAR/RLFGI motifs to enhance repression activity
edges.evidence: EAR and RLFGI mutations disrupted interaction between TPL and ARF2 middle domain; ARF2 represses auxin responses via these motifs

edges.mechanism: BR binds BRI1 receptor kinase at plasma membrane
edges.evidence: BR acts through the cell surface receptor BRI1 and transcription factors BZR1 and BES1

edges.mechanism: BR-bound BRI1 heterodimerizes with BAK1 co-receptor
edges.evidence: BRI1 dimerizes with BAK1 co-receptor upon BR binding

edges.mechanism: active BRI1-BAK1 inactivates BIN2 kinase
edges.evidence: active BR receptor complex leads to BIN2 inhibition

edges.mechanism: GSK3-like kinase phosphorylates and destabilizes BZR1
edges.evidence: The GSK3-like kinase BIN2 phosphorylates and destabilizes BZR1, a positive regulator of the brassinosteroid signaling pathway

edges.mechanism: GSK3-like kinase phosphorylates BES1
edges.evidence: BIN2 phosphorylates BES1/BZR1 family transcription factors to inhibit their function

edges.mechanism: BZR1 binds SHB1 promoter (ChIP)
edges.evidence: BZR1 bound to the promoters of SHB1, IKU1, IKU2, AP2, and ARF2

edges.mechanism: BZR1 binds IKU1 promoter (ChIP)
edges.evidence: BZR1 also binds to the promoter region of IKU1

edges.mechanism: BZR1 binds IKU2 promoter (ChIP)
edges.evidence: BZR1 targeting and regulating IKU1 and thus affect MINI3 which leads to IKU2 activation

edges.mechanism: BZR1 represses AP2 (negative regulator of seed size)
edges.evidence: BZR1 binding to the AP2 promoter represses the negative regulator

edges.mechanism: BZR1 represses ARF2 (negative regulator of seed size)
edges.evidence: BZR1 modulates integument development through binding to ARF2

edges.mechanism: BR promotes coenocytic growth dose-dependently
edges.evidence: BRs promote endosperm growth in a dose-dependent manner

edges.mechanism: BES1 recruits JMJ demethylases to remove H3K27me3
edges.evidence: BES1 recruits JMJs...to target loci, enabling seed coat gene expression

edges.mechanism: BR biosynthesis enzyme (5-alpha reductase)
edges.evidence: det2 BR-deficient mutants; det2 seeds 17% lighter than wild-type

edges.mechanism: BR biosynthesis enzyme (C-22 hydroxylase)
edges.evidence: dwf4 seeds 17% lighter than wild-type; BR biosynthesis blocked

edges.mechanism: BAS1/PHYB/SOB7 inactivate BR
edges.evidence: BR is inactivated by BAS1 and related hydroxylases

edges.mechanism: GA promotes seed coat formation via DELLA degradation
edges.evidence: exogenous application of GA3 drives asexual seed coat formation without fertilization

perturbations.evidence_sentence: YUC10 loss reduces endosperm auxin and seed coat development
double yuc10 yuc11 compromises post-fertilization auxin production

perturbations.condition: wei8 tar1 tar2/+ compromises auxin biosynthesis
perturbations.evidence_sentence: wei8 tar1 tar2/+ shows 20-30% seed abortion; ~2.5% seed coat failure
agl62 shows seed abortion ~3-4 DAP; seed coat fails to develop
arf2 mutants produced 31% and 44% bigger seeds than wild-type
seeds of bri1-5 about 10% lighter than wild-type
seeds of bzr1-1D were not bigger or heavier than wild type
mutations in AP2 suppressed the small-seed phenotype of det2; ap2-6 dramatically heavier than det2
seed weight and area notably larger (like arf2-8 alone)
overexpression of MINI3 in det2 resulted in obviously heavier seeds
bin2-1 constitutively phosphorylates BZR1/BES1; BR signaling impaired
axr1-12/+ axl-1 seeds develop normal seed coat (auxin signaling not required in endosperm)
DD25::IaaH show aborting seeds resembling paternal-excess 3x seeds; cellularization fails at 7 DAP
